text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Oh, Trainer. What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well, it's cleaning day at the dorm, you see.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I was planning to skip it, but Hishiama found me,
and she's the dorm leader, you know?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
A whole escape montage later, I decided to wait
it out by hiding in a locker.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But when I tried to get out... I couldn't open the
door.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: It felt like something was blocking it. Sigh... It was the worst in there, all dark and cramped.
